title: pavonia kunthii var. mollis
intro: Pavonia kunthii var. mollis, also known as velvetmallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, characterized by its soft, velvety leaves and stems. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pavonia kunthii var. mollis include wound healing, reduction of pain and inflammation, and potential relief from certain gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making a tea or infusion from the leaves and stems, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
